hooks.command: root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$root" || exit 0; if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then git add -A && git commit -q -m "auto: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" && for i in 1 2 3; do git push -q origin HEAD 2>/dev/null && break; sleep $((2**i)); done; fi; exit 0
